items.title: Controlling Reasoning Effort in LLMs
items.core_innovation: Explains mechanisms behind low/med/high reasoning effort modes
items.significance: Clarifies how models learn to trade compute for accuracy

items.title: Kimi K3: 2.8T parameter open MoE with Kimi Delta Attention
items.core_innovation: First open 3T-class MoE model with 1M context, novel attention
items.significance: Closes open/closed gap; competitive with frontier closed models

items.title: QUADS: Stabilizing NVFP4 RL for MoE via Quantization-error Alignment
items.core_innovation: Dual-side quant-error alignment stabilizes FP4 RL rollouts
items.significance: Enables 4-bit rollout speed without RL training collapse

items.title: MXSens: Sensitivity-Aware Mixed-Precision Quantization for LLM Inference
items.core_innovation: Hardware-native microscaling quant compatible with rotation methods
items.significance: Reduces 4-bit accuracy loss without software overhead

items.title: Distilled Reinforcement Learning for LLM Post-training
items.core_innovation: Hybrid RL/on-policy-distillation resolving credit assignment tradeoffs

items.title: Understanding Reasoning from Pretraining to Post-Training
items.core_innovation: Controlled study linking pretraining choices to RL returns
items.significance: First systematic account of what RL post-training actually changes

items.title: Copy Less, Ground More: Evidence-Aware RL for Long-Context Reasoning
items.core_innovation: RL method fixing repetitive copying failure in long-context CoT
items.significance: Addresses pervasive failure mode across frontier long-context LLMs

items.title: Selective State-Space Adaptation and Retrieval (MaLoRA)
items.core_innovation: Mamba-modulated LoRA with token-level dynamic adaptation
items.significance: Moves beyond static LoRA toward instance-aware adaptation

items.title: How Does Alignment Tuning Shape Sycophancy Representations?
items.core_innovation: Locates cue-induced bias directions in hidden states across models
items.significance: Mechanistic insight into why alignment tuning induces sycophancy

items.title: FailureAtlas: Taxonomy of Failure Modes in Multi-Provider LLM Serving
items.core_innovation: First unified taxonomy for LLM gateway/proxy failure modes
items.significance: Practical framework for production LLM infra reliability

items.title: Model Routing Is Simple. Until It Isn't.
items.core_innovation: Practical lessons on production LLM routing complexity
items.significance: Actionable guidance for multi-model deployment architectures

items.title: Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber
items.core_innovation: New efficient Flash-tier models targeting agents and cost
items.significance: Signals shift toward token-efficient inference over frontier scale

items.title: Laguna S 2.1 (Poolside)
items.core_innovation: 118B open-weight model designed for local DGX Spark execution
items.significance: Notable Western open-weight entrant amid Chinese MoE dominance

items.title: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Embed
items.core_innovation: Open 8B embedding model topping RTEB retrieval benchmark
items.significance: Strong open option for enterprise RAG/search pipelines

items.title: Feyn AI SQRL: Text-to-SQL with DB Inspection
items.core_innovation: Small model (35B-A3B) inspects schema before query generation
items.significance: Outperforms larger closed models on BIRD benchmark efficiently

items.title: Contraction-Gauge Preconditioning for Quantized Matrix Multiplication
